items.title: The Allstate Corporation (ALL) Hits Fresh High: Is There Still Room to Run?
items.description: Allstate (ALL) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

items.title: Travelers Recognized for Military-Friendly Culture
items.description: HARTFORD, Conn., November 24, 2025--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced it has maintained its Gold rank on VIQTORY’s Military Friendly® Companies list, as well as its inclusion on the Military Friendly® Employers and Military Spouse Friendly Employers® lists. The company was also once again named to the Military Times Best for Vets Employers list.
